prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Bentley 6.0L twin-turbo W12 (engine code: CREWE-60-TT)** with a **Rotrex C38-91 supercharger** (custom-mapped via **Alientech KESS3 ECU flasher**) to push output from 626 HP to **850 HP at 6,200 RPM** and **950 Nm of torque at 3,500 RPM**, paired with a **Forge Motorsport W12-specific intercooler** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio)** for reliability under boost.

Install a **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust system (Flying Spur W12 S-specific, 80mm tips)** with **Akrapović titanium downpipes (de-catted, 3.5-inch diameter)** to reduce backpressure by 40% while retaining Bentley’s signature V12 acoustics, tuned via **AP Racing 350mm carbon-ceramic brake rotors (front) and 330mm (rear)** to handle the increased power.

Replace the stock **ZF 8HP90X 8-speed transmission** with a **Porsche PDK 9-speed (911 Turbo S-derived) conversion kit by Kreisel Electric**, featuring a **Puech GT4-style paddle-shift system** (0.1s upshift, 0.15s downshift) and a **Wavetrac limited-slip differential (W12-specific, 45% lockup)** for improved launch control and cornering stability.
estetica: Fit a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Flying Spur-specific, carbon fiber)** with **custom 3D-printed ABS fender flares (2.5-inch wider front, 3-inch wider rear)**, paired with **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (21x10.5 ET35 front, 22x12.5 ET40 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R21 front, 325/25 R22 rear)** for aggressive stance and grip.

Install a **Vorsteiner carbon fiber front splitter (Bentley OEM+ design, 3-piece)** with **custom aluminum canards (Aeroflow Dynamics, 3D-milled)** and a **Rear diffuser by Prior Design (carbon fiber, 50mm deeper than OEM)** to reduce lift by 35% at 150 mph, complemented by **LED sequential turn signals (Lux H8 V4, Bentley-specific housing)** for a modernized look.

Replace the stock interior with **Recaro Pole Position seats (W12 S-specific, carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** featuring **Schroth 6-point harnesses (Bentley-certified mounting points)** and a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip, 380mm diameter)** with **custom Bentley crest embroidery**, paired with a **Rolls-Royce Wraith-style digital instrument cluster (12.3-inch, custom firmware by 10:10 Design)** for a track-focused yet luxurious cabin.
